commands.payload:
RobSharper.Ros.MessageCli 2.1.0
JOANNEUM RESEARCH Forschungsgesellschaft mbH

  build                   Generates .Net messages from ROS message packages.

  config-feeds            View or edit nuget feed configuration options.

  config-namespace        View or edit the default root namespace for generated
                          message packages.

  config-output           View or edit the default output format for generated
                          message packages.

  config-codegenerator    View or edit the default code generator.

  help                    Display more information on a specific command.

  version                 Display version information.

result.stderr:
RobSharper.Ros.MessageCli 2.1.0
JOANNEUM RESEARCH Forschungsgesellschaft mbH
USAGE:
Build nuget package:
  dotnet-rosmsg build --nupkg ./path/to/ros/message/package ./nuget
Build dll:
  dotnet-rosmsg build --dll ./path/to/ros/message/package ./lib
Build dll & nuget package:
  dotnet-rosmsg build --dll --nupkg ./path/to/ros/message/package ./bin

  --dll                      Create DLL (overrides default output
                             configuration).

  --nupkg                    Create nuget package (overrides default output
                             configuration).

  --preserve                 Do not delete generated source code after package
                             generation.

  -f, --filter               Only generates packages matching the filter (e.g.
                             '*_msgs' or 'geometry_msgs nav_msgs my_msgs').

  -r, --required-packages    Add other directories containing required packages
                             (e.g. '/opt/ros/melodic/share').

  --no-ros-package-path      Do not use $ROS_PACKAGE_PATH as source for required
                             packages.

  --namespace                Root namespace (overrides default configuration).

  --codegenerator            Used Code generator: robsharper | rosnet (overrides
                             default configuration).

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

  PackagePath (pos. 0)       Required. ROS package(s) source folder.

  OutputPath (pos. 1)        Required. Output path for generated packages.

RobSharper.Ros.MessageCli 2.1.0
JOANNEUM RESEARCH Forschungsgesellschaft mbH
USAGE:
Show configured code generator:
  dotnet-rosmsg config-codegenerator
Set code generator to RobSharper :
  dotnet-rosmsg config-codegenerator robsharper
Set code generator to Ros.Net :
  dotnet-rosmsg config-codegenerator rosnet

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.

  Value (pos. 1)    Code generator for package generation: robsharper | rosnet.
                    Updating the value also resets the default namespace.

result.stderr:
RobSharper.Ros.MessageCli 2.1.0
JOANNEUM RESEARCH Forschungsgesellschaft mbH
USAGE:
List nuget feeds:
  dotnet-rosmsg config-feeds show
Add nuget feed:
  dotnet-rosmsg config-feeds add "My NuGet feed"
  https://robotics-baget.joanneum.at/v3/index.json 3
Add nuget feed:
  dotnet-rosmsg config-feeds add "My NuGet feed"
  https://robotics-baget.joanneum.at/v3/index.json
Add nuget feed:
  dotnet-rosmsg config-feeds add "My NuGet feed" /path/to/nuget/files/
Remove nuget feed:
  dotnet-rosmsg config-feeds remove "My NuGet feed"

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

  Command (pos. 1)     (Default: show) show | add | remove

  Name (pos. 2)        Name of the nuget feed.

  Source (pos. 3)      Nuget feed source.

  Protocol (pos. 4)    Optional nuget protocol version (e.g. 3).

staticCommands.name: build
staticCommands.description: Generates .Net messages from ROS message packages.

options.description: Used Code generator: robsharper | rosnet (overrides default configuration).
Only generates packages matching the filter (e.g. '*_msgs' or 'geometry_msgs nav_msgs my_msgs').
Do not use $ROS_PACKAGE_PATH as source for required packages.
Create nuget package (overrides default output configuration).
Do not delete generated source code after package generation.
Add other directories containing required packages (e.g. '/opt/ros/melodic/share').
